tasks.label: Build (F7)
tasks.command: cmd /c ""C:\Users\i4studio\esp\v5.4.1\esp-idf\export.bat" && idf.py build && cmake --build build --target host_coverage" && Write-Host '' && Write-Host '========== COVERAGE SUMMARY ==========' -ForegroundColor Cyan && if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage.info') { & C:/msys64/usr/bin/lcov --summary tests/build/coverage.info ; Write-Host '======================================' -ForegroundColor Cyan ; Write-Host 'HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'coverage.info not found at tests/build/coverage.info' -ForegroundColor Yellow }
